01 / ABOUT

Who I Am

Surendar R S is a full stack and cross-platform mobile developer based in Bengaluru, India. I intern as an App Developer at Trilochana Aerospace & Defence Technologies, where I build AviaTool — a production-grade Flutter/Firebase MRO application covering engineer check-in/out, tool inventory, calibration alerts, QR attendance scanning, admin reporting, and PDF/CSV export.

Outside aerospace, I ship independent products: AI interview platforms, job portals, salary expense trackers, fitness apps, and book utilities — each taken from concept to a live deployed URL.

I pair development with practical digital marketing expertise, helping small businesses launch online with products that are actually found and used. UPI and Razorpay integrations are standard in my India-focused builds.
